testCases.title: Empty Form — Place Order Blocked
testCases.notes: Place Order button disabled when all payment fields empty. CyberSource Flex Microform loaded with 2 iframes from testflex.cybersource.com.

testCases.title: Valid Card — Successful Order Placement
testCases.notes: Order CO260420-00001 created successfully. Tokenization at testflex.cybersource.com/flex/v2/tokens [201]. CreateOrderFromCart [200]. AuthorizePayment [200]. Raw card number not transmitted to storefront. checkout/completed page reached.

testCases.title: Invalid Card Number — Validation Error
testCases.notes: Invalid card number (1234567890123456) triggers flex-microform-invalid CSS class on card number container. Place Order button disabled.

testCases.title: Expired Card — Validation Error
testCases.notes: Expired expiry date (01/2020) triggers validation failure. Place Order button disabled.

testCases.title: Empty Cardholder Name — Submission Blocked
testCases.notes: Cardholder name field is in parent page DOM (aria-label='Cardholder name'). Empty name blocks form submission — Place Order button disabled.

testCases.title: Missing Expiry Date — Submission Blocked
testCases.notes: Empty expiry date (aria-label='Expiration date') blocks form submission. Field auto-formats input to MM / YYYY pattern when filled. Place Order button disabled.

testCases.title: Missing CVV — Submission Blocked
testCases.notes: Empty CVV (securityCode) field in cross-origin iframe blocks form submission. Place Order button disabled.

testCases.title: All Fields Invalid — Form Blocked
testCases.notes: With all fields invalid simultaneously, Place Order button remains disabled. No partial submission possible.

testCases.title: Short Card Number — Validation Error
testCases.notes: 12-digit card number triggers flex-microform-invalid state on card number container. Button disabled.

testCases.title: CVV Max Length Enforcement
testCases.notes: 2-digit CVV: flex-microform-invalid CSS class not propagated to parent DOM (cross-origin iframe limitation), but Place Order button was disabled — form correctly prevents submission with incomplete CVV. BL-PAY-001 satisfied: payment cannot proceed.

testCases.title: Invalid Luhn Card Number — Validation Error
testCases.notes: Card number failing Luhn check triggers flex-microform-invalid state on card number container. Button disabled.

testCases.title: CVV Alphabetic Input Rejected
testCases.notes: CVV field (securityCode) inside Flex Microform iframe accepts alphabetic characters. Input '8a8' and 'abc' both accepted without triggering flex-microform-invalid. Place Order button remained ENABLED with alphabetic CVV input. Violates BL-PAY-001.
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] CVV field rejects non-numeric input — flex-microform-invalid class applied when alphabetic characters entered

testCases.title: Card Number Auto-Formatting
testCases.notes: Card number auto-formatted to '4622 9431 2701 3705' (groups of 4 separated by spaces) as expected.

testCases.title: Visa Card Type Detection
testCases.notes: Card brand icons rendered inside Flex Microform iframe (not in parent DOM — iconCount: 0 in parent). This is expected Flex Microform architecture — card type detection and icon display occur within the secure cross-origin iframe.

testCases.title: CVV Input Masking
testCases.notes: CVV field is type='text' inside iframe but cross-origin isolation is the security mechanism — parent page JS cannot read CVV value (blocked: 'Blocked a frame with origin...'). Placeholder '•••' provides visual indication. Tokenization confirms card data sent directly to testflex.cybersource.com, never to storefront.

testCases.title: Card Number Field in Secure Iframe
testCases.notes: input[name='number'] confirmed in frame 0 from testflex.cybersource.com. 2 CS iframes present. Card number field isolated in cross-origin iframe — parent page cannot access it.

testCases.title: CVV Field in Secure Iframe
testCases.notes: input[name='securityCode'] confirmed in frame 1 from testflex.cybersource.com. CVV field isolated in cross-origin iframe — parent page cannot access it.

testCases.title: No Raw Card Data in Network Requests
testCases.notes: Raw card number 4622943127013705 NOT found in any request URL or body sent to storefront. Tokenization flow: (1) JWE-encrypted payload to testflex.cybersource.com/flex/v2/tokens [201], (2) CreateOrderFromCart with cartId only, (3) AuthorizePayment with JWT token — never raw card digits.

testCases.title: No Card Data in Browser Storage
testCases.notes: localStorage: 0 keys with card number patterns. sessionStorage: 0 keys with card number patterns. Cookie false positive (_ga=GA1.1.2066834967 matches 13-digit regex) is Google Analytics ID, not card data. No PAN stored in browser.

testCases.title: All Payment Pages Served Over HTTPS
testCases.notes: All URLs confirmed HTTPS: cart (https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/cart), iframe 0 (https://testflex.cybersource.com/...), iframe 1 (https://testflex.cybersource.com/...), checkout/completed (https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/checkout/completed).

testCases.title: JWT Token Authentication in Iframe
testCases.notes: JWT keyId (0851wR6yONaDn18TDosjLgp7zM73TUyc) present in both iframe URLs. Tokenization endpoint returned [201] with JWE-encrypted token. AuthorizePayment sent token only — never raw card. New keyId generated per page load confirming single-use tokens. Parent contentDocument access blocked by browser same-origin policy.

testCases.title: 3DS Challenge Flow — Successful Authentication
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Required environment variables absent from .env — TEST_3DS_CARD, TEST_3DS_EXP, TEST_3DS_CVV, TEST_3DS_PASSWORD. A dedicated 3DS test card is required to trigger the challenge flow; CYBERSOURCE_CARD does not exercise 3DS.

testCases.title: 3DS Challenge Flow — Failed Authentication
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Required environment variables absent from .env — TEST_3DS_CARD, TEST_3DS_EXP, TEST_3DS_CVV, TEST_3DS_WRONG_PASSWORD. Cannot test failed 3DS challenge without a dedicated 3DS test card.

bugs.title: CyberSource CVV field accepts alphabetic characters — Place Order button not blocked
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] CVV field rejects non-numeric input — flex-microform-invalid class applied when alphabetic characters entered
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/bulk-order, add product 'Printer1' qty 1 to cart.
2. Navigate to /cart.
3. Select delivery method 'Fixed Rate (Ground)'.
4. Select payment method 'CyberSource'.
5. Wait 3-4 seconds for Flex Microform iframes to load from testflex.cybersource.com.
6. Fill card number field (iframe frame 0): 4622943127013705.
7. Fill cardholder name (parent DOM, aria-label='Cardholder name'): 'John Smith'.
8. Fill expiry date (parent DOM, aria-label='Expiration date'): 09/2029.
9. Click CVV/Security Code container (#securityCode-container).
10. In the securityCode input (iframe frame 1), type: '8a8' (alphanumeric).
11. Tab out of the CVV field.
12. Observe: Place Order button is ENABLED.
bugs.expected: CVV field should reject non-numeric characters. The flex-microform-invalid CSS class should be applied to the #securityCode-container. The Place Order button should remain disabled when CVV contains any alphabetic characters.
bugs.actual: CVV field accepted '8a8' and 'abc' without triggering flex-microform-invalid. Place Order button became enabled, allowing potential order submission with a non-numeric CVV value. Confirmed in screenshot: test-results/chrome/page-2026-04-20T18-24-39-550Z.png showing '8a8' in Security code field with PLACE ORDER button active.
